'''Snagel''' was a member of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Select Committee/Legends|Select Committee]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

==Biography==
Snagel was sent a code-message by [[Ranulf Trommer/Legends|Ranulf Trommer]], who was investigating the suspicious activities [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Grigor (governor)|Grigor]] on the planet [[M'haeli/Legends|M'haeli]] some months after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. The message contained enough information to "put Grigor in chains".

Snagel appears to have passed this information to Grigor's superior, as [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Lynch Hauser]] arrived with an assault force to take control of the planet.

Ranulf's reaction to the invasion force implies that he regarded Snagel as having some sort of relationship with the [[Imperial High Command/Legends|Imperial High Command]], as he commented to [[Mora]]: "I sent a coded message to the High Command, describing Grigor's illegal mining operation. This armed force is their answer!".

==Appearances==
*[[River of Chaos 3|''River of Chaos'' 3]] {{1stm}}
